---
title: "02_lmer_variablity"
author: "Stróbl Anita"
date: "2026-04-09"
output: html_document
---

``` {r packages, message = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(psych) 
library(rstatix)
library(lme4)        
library(lmerTest)    
library(performance) 
library(sjPlot) 
library(MuMIn)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(gtsummary)
library(flextable)
library(writexl)

```

``` {r import database}

dat <- read_csv("databases/dat_processed.csv")

```
